title: GeoEvolve: Algorithm Evolution
subtitle: Watch a geospatial algorithm evolve across 10 LLM-guided rounds
description: An animated walkthrough of GeoEvolve's iterative optimization process. Each round shows the RAG knowledge retrieved, the diagnosis of current limitations, code diffs, and performance metrics (Rand Index, NMI, SSR, MAE) — making the entire discovery process transparent and inspectable.

title: Spatial Uncertainty Visualizer
subtitle: Interactive conformal prediction for spatial data
description: Upload your own spatial dataset, choose a model (OLS, Random Forest, XGBoost, GWR), and explore location-adaptive prediction intervals via conformal inference. Visualizes uncertainty maps, halo glyphs, and coverage diagnostics.

title: GeoXCP Explorer
subtitle: Uncertainty quantification for spatial SHAP explanations
description: Explore how feature importance (SHAP values) varies across geographic space, and how much we can trust those explanations at each location. Supports Seattle housing, NYC income, and US voting datasets.

title: GeoXCP Radial Focus
subtitle: Localized feature importance with a radial lens
description: Place a focus circle anywhere on the map to examine feature importance and geo-uncertainty for nearby data points. A polar-coordinate chart ranks features by SHAP magnitude and uncertainty within the selected region.

title: GeoXCP Bivariate
subtitle: Bivariate color mapping + radar charts for spatial explainability
description: A 3×3 bivariate color scheme encodes SHAP importance and geo-uncertainty simultaneously. Hover any point to reveal a radar chart of per-feature contributions with uncertainty bands, or Alt+hover for a neighborhood focus view.
